summary: Tested driver available orders system with can_accept restriction. Feature working correctly: Product orders show disabled '🔒 غير متاح حالياً' button with warning 'أكمل طلبات الطعام أولاً' when driver has active food orders. Food orders show active '✅ قبول الطلب' button.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend delivery.py (lines 585-615): Correctly adds can_accept=false and cannot_accept_reason for product orders when driver has active hot/fresh food orders
Frontend AvailableOrdersList.js (lines 200-235): Properly renders disabled button with lock icon and warning message based on can_accept field
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver available orders restriction feature is fully functional. Driver with active food orders cannot accept product orders until food orders are completed.

logic: count_hot_fresh_food_orders() counts active food orders with hot/fresh store types
has_hot_fresh_orders flag set based on count > 0
Product orders get can_accept=false when has_hot_fresh_orders is true
Product orders get cannot_accept_reason='أكمل طلبات الطعام أولاً'
Food orders always get can_accept=true (priority for fresh food)
Checks order.can_accept === false to show disabled button
Disabled button shows '🔒 غير متاح حالياً' with gray styling
Warning message shows order.cannot_accept_reason or default text
Active button shows '✅ قبول الطلب' with green gradient
